  • Uses of NotEnoughFoodException in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.RMI

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.RMI that throw NotEnoughFoodException
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ServerRemoteInterface.selectCardFromBottomList(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Selects a card from the bottom market row and adds it to the player's tribe.
    void
    ServerRemoteInterface.selectCardFromTopList(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Selects a card from the top market row and adds it to the player's tribe.
    void
    ServerRemoteInterface.selectExtraCard(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Selects one extra card from the market, triggered by the draw-one-more building effect.

  • Uses of NotEnoughFoodException in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.Socket

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.webLayer.Socket that throw NotEnoughFoodException
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ServerSocketProxy.selectCardFromBottomList(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Sends a request to draw a card from the bottom market list.
    void
    ServerSocketProxy.selectCardFromTopList(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Sends a request to draw a card from the top market list.
    void
    ServerSocketProxy.selectExtraCard(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Sends a request to draw an extra card and blocks until the server confirms success or sends back an error.

  • Uses of NotEnoughFoodException in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Controller

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Controller that throw NotEnoughFoodException
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Controller.selectCardFromBottomList(Player player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Lets the player pick a tribe member or building from the previous-round (bottom) market row.
    void
    Controller.selectCardFromTopList(Player player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Lets the player pick a tribe member or building from the current-round (top) market row.
    void
    Controller.selectExtraCard(Player player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Resolves the bonus draw granted by the draw-one-more mechanic: picks the chosen card from the top market row and adds it to the player's tribe.

  • Uses of NotEnoughFoodException in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game that throw NotEnoughFoodException
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Market.buyBuildingBottomList(int position, Player player)
    Purchases a building from the bottom row and adds it to the player's buildings.
    void
    Market.buyBuildingTopList(int position, Player player)
    Purchases a building from the top row and adds it to the player's buildings.
    void
    Market.buyExtraBuildingFromSnapshot(int position, Player player)
    Buys a building from the end-of-round snapshot (not the current top row) and adds it to the player's buildings.
    void
    Game.selectExtraCardFromTopList(CARD_TYPE cardType, int position, Player player)
    Draws one extra card from the top market row for the given player without touching the offer-tile action counter.
    void
    Game.selectGenericCardBottomLists(CARD_TYPE toBuyCardType, int position, Player player)
    Selects a card from the bottom list and adds it to the player, then decrements the player's remaining bottom-draw actions.
    void
    Game.selectGenericCardTopLists(CARD_TYPE toBuyCardType, int position, Player player)
    this method adds a card from the top list

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ServerNetworkHandler.selectCardFromBottomList(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Lets the player pick a card from the previous-round (bottom) market row during the resolve-action phase.
    void
    ServerNetworkHandler.selectCardFromTopList(PlayerDTO player, CARD_TYPE cardType, int position)
    Lets the player pick a card from the current-round (top) market row during the resolve-action phase.
